demo-backendservice1/Dockerfile.general_idea: Update the Maven build stage base image to use Java 21 and a newer Maven version.
Update the runtime stage base image to use Java 21.

demo-backendservice1/pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler plugin version to a newer release compatible with the target JDK.
Change Maven compiler release target from Java 17 to Java 21 to enforce JDK 21 compilation.
demo-backendservice1/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles against JDK 17 bytecode, failing to utilize JDK 21 features or potentially causing runtime issues if strict JDK 21 enforcement is required by the platform.

demo-backendservice1/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Quarkus platform BOM from version 2.x to 3.x to support Jakarta EE 10 and JDK 21.
demo-backendservice1/pom.xml.why_exists: Quarkus 2.x does not support JDK 21 as a baseline and uses javax.* namespaces; Quarkus 3.x is required for JDK 21 compatibility and Jakarta EE 10 (jakarta.* namespaces).

demo-backendservice1/pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven Surefire plugin version to a newer release.
Introduce a dedicated property for the Maven Failsafe plugin version.
Upgrade Quarkus MicroProfile extension to version 3.x to align with Quarkus 3.x and Jakarta EE 10.
demo-backendservice1/pom.xml.why_exists: Version 2.x of the extension is incompatible with Quarkus 3.x and relies on javax.* namespaces which are removed in Jakarta EE 10.

demo-backendservice1/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Unleash client library to version 8.0.0.
Decouple Failsafe plugin version from Surefire plugin version by using its own property.

demo-backendservice1/src/main/java/DemoA.general_idea: Migrate JAX-RS and Common Annotations imports from javax to jakarta namespace.
demo-backendservice1/src/main/java/DemoA.why_exists: Compilation failure: classes in javax.ws.rs and javax.annotation packages are removed or relocated in Jakarta EE 9+ compliant runtimes (like Quarkus on JDK 21).

demo-backendservice1/src/main/java/DemoA.general_idea: Add MicroProfile Metrics annotation to track request counts for the main messaging endpoint.

Declare InterruptedException in the method signature to support the new sleep logic.
Add conditional delay logic controlled by a feature toggle to simulate latency.
Add MicroProfile Metrics annotation to track request counts for the backup messaging endpoint.

demo-backendservice1/src/main/java/DemoA.general_idea: Add MicroProfile OpenAPI annotation to document the backup messaging endpoint.
Add MicroProfile OpenAPI annotation to document the feature toggle endpoint.
Update the default greeting message in the entry point.
demo-backendservice1/src/main/java/DemoA.after: String message = "Hai there! Nothing to see here. I am the backend service.";

demo-backendservice1/src/main/java/DemoA.general_idea: Add import for TimeUnit to support the new sleep logic.
Add imports for MicroProfile Metrics and OpenAPI annotations.

demo-service1/Dockerfile.general_idea: Update the Maven build stage base image to use Java 21 and a newer Maven version.
Update the runtime stage base image to use Java 21.

demo-service1/pom.xml.general_idea: Update maven-compiler-plugin version to a newer release compatible with Java 21.
Change Maven compiler release target from Java 17 to Java 21.
demo-service1/pom.xml.why_exists: The project is migrating to JDK 21; compiling with release 17 would produce bytecode incompatible with the target runtime or fail if the source code uses Java 21 features.

demo-service1/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Quarkus platform BOM from version 2.x to 3.x.
demo-service1/pom.xml.why_exists: Quarkus 3.x is required for Java 21 support and Jakarta EE 9+ namespace migration; Quarkus 2.x does not support Java 21.

demo-service1/pom.xml.general_idea: Update maven-surefire-plugin version to a newer release.
Add explicit property for maven-failsafe-plugin version.

demo-service1/pom.xml.why_exists: Version 2.7.2.Final is incompatible with Quarkus 3.x platform; using it would cause dependency resolution conflicts or runtime errors.

demo-service1/pom.xml.general_idea: Decouple maven-failsafe-plugin version from surefire-plugin version property.

demo-service1/src/main/java/DemoApp.java.general_idea: Migrate annotation imports from javax.annotation to jakarta.annotation to align with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements.
demo-service1/src/main/java/DemoApp.java.why_exists: The javax.annotation package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ and newer JDKs; using it causes a compile error (package not found).

demo-service1/src/main/java/DemoApp.java.general_idea: Migrate injection imports from javax.inject to jakarta.inject to align with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements.
demo-service1/src/main/java/DemoApp.java.why_exists: The javax.inject package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ and newer JDKs; using it causes a compile error (package not found).

demo-service1/src/main/java/DemoApp.java.general_idea: Migrate JAX-RS annotation imports from javax.ws.rs to jakarta.ws.rs to align with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements.
demo-service1/src/main/java/DemoApp.java.why_exists: The javax.ws.rs package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ and newer JDKs; using it causes a compile error (package not found).

demo-service1/src/main/java/DemoApp.java.general_idea: Remove unused import for java.util.Random to clean up the source file.

demo-service1/src/main/java/SomeWebServi.general_idea: Migrate JAX-RS annotations from javax.ws.rs to jakarta.ws.rs to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements.
demo-service1/src/main/java/SomeWebServi.why_exists: javax.ws.rs classes are not available in Jakarta EE 9+ runtimes (like Quarkus on Java 21), causing ClassNotFoundException or compilation errors if the javax dependency is removed.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties to Java 21 to align with the JDK migration.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project would compile against Java 17 language features and bytecode, failing to utilize Java 21 features or potentially causing compatibility issues if the runtime is strictly Java 21.
